channel.title: Smtp on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Smtp on Pi Stack

item.title: Postal vs Stalwart vs Haraka: Best Self-Hosted SMTP Relay 2026
item.description: If you’re sending transactional emails, running a mailing list, or building a self-hosted mail infrastructure, relying on commercial SMTP providers like SendGrid, Mailgun, or Amazon SES means giving up control over your email pipeline — and paying per-message fees that add up quickly. Self-hosted SMTP relay solutions put you back in charge: no per-email costs, full data privacy, and complete control over deliverability, routing, and compliance.
